warning: This register structures the paper-informed audit into implementation and review work. Local engineering mitigations do not replace clinician, educator, accessibility, privacy, or institutional review.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Only 45 of 2,445 public chunks are quote-backed and auditable.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Raise quote-backed coverage until common debrief, triage, management, and reassessment feedback can cite original source excerpts.

weaknesses.current_weakness: 98.16% of chunks are generated summaries marked as needing review.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Treat generated chunks as background only, not primary learner-facing feedback evidence.

weaknesses.current_weakness: 2,400 chunks lack auditable locator support.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add page, section, DOI/PMID, stable URL, search phrase, and quote hash where possible.

weaknesses.current_weakness: `review_status: reviewed` coexists with `evidence_status: generated_needs_review`, which can confuse source governance.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Split "source accepted into bundle" from "claim-level evidence verified."

weaknesses.current_weakness: Many chunks are template-derived rather than extracted from source text.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Build a source-excerpt extraction and human review workflow for priority topics.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Source URLs are often broad guideline indexes rather than exact recommendations.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Prefer direct guideline pages/PDF sections and retain exact locator metadata.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The source freshness/update policy is implicit.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add stale-source checks, review dates, and scheduled source refresh criteria.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The bundle does not prove source URLs still resolve or that search phrases still match.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add a source-link and quote-verification CI script.

weaknesses.current_weakness: High-risk topics have at least one quote-backed chunk, but not enough depth for nuanced feedback.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Define minimum quote coverage per high-risk topic and facet, not only per topic.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The quality report is JSON-only and easy for maintainers to miss.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add a dashboard or docs summary that surfaces quote-backed coverage and review backlog.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Runtime retrieval is tested by a small preset matrix of 9 queries.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Expand the matrix to include all major ESI levels, common ED chief complaints, and negative controls.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Retrieval scoring can select valid sources that are weakly aligned with the exact learner mistake.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add claim-to-reference semantic alignment checks and minimum per-claim support thresholds.

weaknesses.current_weakness: High-risk detection relies on a regex query classifier.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add topic/facet-based risk classification from cases, actions, and claims.

weaknesses.current_weakness: If semantic vectors are not warmed, BM25 fallback may be used silently for important feedback.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Require a retrieval-quality badge and fail-closed threshold for high-risk feedback.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Generated background chunks can still appear in retrieval results for non-high-risk feedback.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Make learner-facing feedback prefer quote-backed references by default, with generated background hidden or clearly labeled.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The browser validator checks citation IDs and high-risk quote requirements, not actual textual entailment.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add deterministic contradiction and relevance checks in the browser path, modeled after `scripts/audit_grounding.py`.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The grounding audit is mainly an offline/restricted script.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Create a public-safe grounding regression fixture for every feedback category.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The current citation contract requires citations but not enough citation quality.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add citation status tiers: exact quote-backed, anchored source-level, generated background, invalid.

weaknesses.current_weakness: With an API key, the debrief automatically calls the AI debrief path.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Make open-evidence deterministic feedback the default and require explicit user action for LLM enrichment.

weaknesses.current_weakness: AI-generated SOAP and tips are merged into the main debrief when available.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Keep LLM output in a separate "AI draft" panel unless it passes strict evidence and review gates.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Current LLM feedback is an optional enhancement, but not consistently framed as fallback.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Rename and reorganize settings around "Evidence feedback" first and "AI draft support" second.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The no-key tutor is locked instead of offering a browser-only evidence tutor.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add a no-key evidence tutor that answers from deterministic feedback plus retrieved open references.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Local reasoning review is keyword/rubric based and not source-cited.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Attach open-evidence references to each rubric criterion and learner gap.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Deterministic priority feedback does not display citations.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add source-backed citations to ESI rules, resource logic, red flags, and reassessment guidance.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Fail-closed LLM grounding returns generic fallback guidance.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Generate richer browser-only feedback from retrieved references and case atoms when LLM use is blocked.

weaknesses.current_weakness: AI debrief parse failure can return `null`, leaving little learner-facing explanation.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Render an explicit "AI draft unavailable; evidence feedback preserved" state.

weaknesses.current_weakness: External AI settings are prominent compared with evidence settings.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Rebalance UI so evidence quality, source provenance, and local deterministic feedback are the default mental model.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Clinical tips from AI can overwrite or replace `next_case_checklist`.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Preserve deterministic checklist and append AI suggestions only as draft additions.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Case evidence atoms are capped at 24, which may omit relevant evidence in richer local cases.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add task-specific atom selection and show omitted evidence counts.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Claim citations can cite case facts or references, but feedback does not show why those citations support the claim.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Display claim, case fact, reference quote, and reasoning link together for important feedback.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The public bundle has only 23 cases.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Expand open/public-safe case coverage or create authored open cases with expert-reviewed answers.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The public case mix is skewed toward high acuity: 12/23 are ESI 1 or 2.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Balance ESI levels, especially ESI 4 and 5, to train resource prediction and low-acuity discrimination.

weaknesses.current_weakness: All public cases lack source-record diagnosis references.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add reviewed diagnosis references or clearly limit diagnosis scoring to structure and evidence use.

weaknesses.current_weakness: All public cases lack clinician-approved referral references.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add expert-reviewed consult/reference decisions or move referral scoring to formative-only until validated.

weaknesses.current_weakness: All public cases lack retrospective ground-truth objects.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add public-safe outcome summaries or remove outcome-dependent claims from public feedback.

weaknesses.current_weakness: All public cases lack optional objective-data unlocks.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add reviewed public objective data such as simulated ECG/lab/imaging snippets, with provenance labels.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Reviewed inferred physical exam facts enrich realism but are not source-record findings.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Keep them clearly labeled and avoid using them as patient-specific truth beyond their reviewed use cases.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The app has no public case-level diagnosis/referral validation set.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Create a clinician-reviewed public gold set for diagnosis, differential, referral, and initial plan.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Public cases cannot support robust learner-outcome or fairness analysis.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Track ESI accuracy, undertriage, overtriage, and gap patterns by case type, acuity, age, sex, and complaint where safe.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Restricted MIMIC local mode is powerful, but public feedback quality cannot depend on restricted data.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Build a public evidence and case layer strong enough to stand alone.

weaknesses.current_weakness: ESI scoring is deterministic, but public diagnosis and referral scoring are source-limited.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Separate scored, formative, and unscored domains visibly in the debrief.

weaknesses.current_weakness: `handoffNeeded` is hard-coded false in feedback generation.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Re-enable conditional SBAR/handoff scoring when consult, escalation, or handoff communication is selected.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Undertriage/overtriage consequences are not tracked longitudinally as educational outcomes.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add learner-level and aggregate metrics for undertriage, overtriage, and high-risk misses.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Rationale scoring uses keyword heuristics for several criteria.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add evidence-linked rubric checks and expert-reviewed examples for each criterion.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The app lacks calibrated benchmarks against expert clinicians or validated instruments.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Build an expert review set and report agreement, accuracy, and reliability.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Current tests verify many metadata properties but not educational validity.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add tests that assert feedback domains map to clinical reasoning constructs and evidence citations.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The app does not explicitly define the clinical reasoning model it teaches.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Publish a curriculum map using noticing, interpreting, responding, reflecting, ESI logic, and ED workflow domains.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Clinical reasoning theory is implicit rather than documented.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Tie feedback to dual process reasoning, illness scripts, cognitive forcing, or another explicit theory.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Assessment validity evidence is not yet reported.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Document content validity, response process evidence, reliability, and relation to outcomes as the app matures.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The app lacks learner-level outcome studies.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Measure behavior or performance changes, not only completion and app correctness.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Optional LLM patient responses risk factual drift and role inconsistency.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Keep static patient dialogue as default and add role-consistency checks for LLM patient responses.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Text-only interaction has limited emotional realism and no nonverbal cues.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add concise behavioral affect cues or standardized patient-style context without overwhelming triage workflow.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Model, prompt, and response metadata are not learner-session transparent enough.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Log model, prompt version, retrieval bundle version, and grounding status for every AI draft.

weaknesses.current_weakness: There is no standardized metric suite for patient realism, factuality, and learning impact.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add VP metrics: factual consistency, patient voice, role consistency, response latency, and learner satisfaction.

weaknesses.current_weakness: AI governance is partly documented through privacy notes, but not as a complete policy.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add an AI governance page covering consent, external AI use, local keys, source licensing, bias, oversight, and incident handling.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Local textbook import sets source-level external AI permission true, relying on a separate session opt-in.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Default local/private sources to external AI disallowed at source level unless explicitly changed by the user.

weaknesses.current_weakness: There is no formal human review queue for generated evidence chunks.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add a review workflow that promotes chunks from generated to quote-backed/human-verified.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Bias and equity monitoring are not visible in the current feedback loop.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Track and review error patterns across demographics and complaint categories where data permits.

weaknesses.current_weakness: Cybersecurity and credential risk are mentioned but not operationalized in app tests.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Add tests and docs for key storage, local source handling, and external provider boundaries.

weaknesses.current_weakness: The debrief can still become dense for learners.
weaknesses.needed_improvement: Make the first screen show one priority learning action, with evidence and scoring details progressively disclosed.
